case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ANGEL REYNAGA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT REYNAGA, ANGEL DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-10-2018
DECLARATION RE: COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033(B)(2) WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100048721) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 100046439) FILED BY ATTORNEY COOK, JORDAN D
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-30-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $285.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100048721) AS TO DEFENDANT REYNAGA, ANGEL
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100046439) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT REYNAGA, ANGEL
DECLARATION OF CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60 (A) (TRANSACTION ID # 100048721) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REYNAGA, ANGEL $7,555.30 PRINCIPAL, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,840.30, SEE SCANNED DOC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100036269), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED JUL-29-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REYNAGA, ANGEL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-30-2019 CONTINUED TO SEP-24-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100048721) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 100048721) FILED BY ATTORNEY COOK, JORDAN D
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-24-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
